kept.text:
$GOOG is up 131% over the last year.

It’s now just a 2% move away from flipping $NVDA and becoming the most valuable company in the world.

It’s clear as day that Google will lead the AI race.

No other company is even remotely as well positioned:

- in-house chips
- full vertical integration
- arguably the strongest AI talent in the world
- billions of Android devices as native distribution
- massive data advantage through Gmail, Docs, Search, Maps, YouTube & more
- distribution to basically every internet user on earth
- enough cash flow to outspend almost everyone for the next decade

profile_bio.description: building a life outside the system

quoted_tweet.text:
Google will clearly emerge as a winner in the AI race.

They manufacture their own chips and have full vertical integration, while others pay the NVIDIA tax.

They have native distribution through over 3 billion Android devices.

Massive data advantage through Gmail, Calendar, Docs and other services.

They’re also among the leaders with their current models, but that’s not even relevant.

In the long run, model performance between different providers will converge anyway.

OpenAI may have the first-mover advantage, but they’re just an app without a platform.

kept.text:
Last night Anthropic announced a multi year $200B commitment to $GOOG Cloud. 

The debate about can Anthropic make good on the deal misses the point. 

The big picture is this announcement underscores how early we are in AI, with the need for compute taking off on the heels of last Novembers step function improvement in many of the models utility.  

That’s good news for the entire AI model and infrastructure stack.

kept.text:
$GOOG $MSFT
Google DeepMind, Microsoft ve xAI, geliştirdikleri yeni yapay zeka modellerini kamuoyuna sunmadan önce ABD hükümetine erken erişim hakkı tanımayı kabul etti. 

Ticaret Bakanlığı bünyesindeki Yapay Zeka Standartları ve İnovasyon Merkezi (CAISI) ile yapılan bu anlaşmalar; modellerin siber güvenlik, biyogüvenlik ve ulusal güvenlik riskleri açısından önceden değerlendirilmesini hedefliyor.

Bu iş birliği ile üç dev şirket, daha önce benzer bir taahhütte bulunan OpenAI ve Anthropic'in safına katıldı. 

Anlaşma kapsamında hükümet yetkilileri, henüz piyasaya sürülmemiş gelişmiş modellerin yeteneklerini ve güvenlik açıklarını test etme imkanına sahip olacak. 

Özellikle Anthropic’in yazılım açıklarını bulabilen "Mythos" adlı modelinin yarattığı endişeler, Washington'un yapay zeka üzerindeki denetim çabalarını hızlandırdı.

kept.text:
Het idee dat aandelen met hoge absolute waardering niet sterk kunnen stijgen, is compleet gesloopt.

- $GOOG, +132% in één jaar, van ~$2T naar $4.7T
- $NVDA, +73% in één jaar, van $2.7T naar $4.9T
- $TSM, +134% in één jaar, van $800B naar $2T

Ik zal nooit meer een kans laten liggen puur vanuit de gedachte "het is al biljoenen waard, hoeveel hoger kan het gaan?"

kept.text:
Alphabet Inc., Microsoft Corp., and xAI will now give the U.S. government early access to their newest AI models before release.

This isn’t just collaboration-it’s control.
With national security concerns rising, regulators want a front-row seat to how powerful AI is built and deployed.

But here’s the real question 

Who should control AI: governments or companies?
